notes: GNN-CB LLM baseline. Generated by Claude Opus 4.7 (claude-opus-4-7) under frozen prompt template prompt.md v1.1 (temperature=0, top_p=1, seed=42). Agent mode (Claude Code). Zero few-shot examples, zero per-task hints, zero prompt edits. 1 repair iteration (cosmetic self-check assertion fix; predictions unchanged - script was deterministic and predictions.csv had already been written before the assert). Pipeline: 96,128-node patient similarity graph with 1.22M undirected edges; 12-dim clinical features (age, bmi, HbA1c level + missing indicator, glucose, hypertension, heart_disease, gender one-hot, smoking history one-hot); HbA1c NaNs (14,368 entries) imputed with train-set median to avoid leakage; 2-layer GraphSAGE (mean aggregator) hidden=128 + BatchNorm + dropout=0.5; CrossEntropyLoss with inverse-frequency class weights ({0:0.574, 1:3.858}) for the 6.7:1 imbalance; Adam lr=5e-3 wd=5e-4 full-batch transductive; early stop on official val.csv Macro-F1 patience=20 max 200 epochs; 5-seed soft-vote ensemble {42..46} averaging class-1 softmax probability. Local val Macro-F1: 0.7820 (ensemble), 0.7811 +/- 0.0052 per-seed. CPU only, wall-clock ~20 min.
